'''Kei No Kay''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Qwohog (species)|Qwohog]] and Wavedancer who worked as a slave for the [[Ishi Tib/Legends|Ishi Tib]] [[Jund Voon]]. She was forced to make intricate items which Voon sold in his shop, [[Wave Works]].

==Biography==
Secretly imprisoned by Jund Voon, Kei was the real driving force behind Wave Works' meteoric rise in popularity. She had tremendous skill in art, a talent that Jund discovered and exploited. She spent her time imprisoned in an artificial tidepool tank. Besides crafting jewelry and trinkets, she had a passion for playing the [[hydroharp]]. Although imprisoned she was not treated poorly as long as she continued to produce quality merchandise. Kei had a brother named [[Koll]] who joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Behind the scenes==
Kei No Kay was designed by [[Paul Danner]] and [[Bill Smith]] for ''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]'', a supplement for the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' that was published by [[West End Games]] in [[1997]]. She was illustrated by [[Joel Carroll]].
